transliterations.transliteration: laak6/lak6 lim1/ling4/ling6 siu1 sin1 gu1 zan3 ngon1/on1
lēi lìng xiāo xiān gū zhèn ān

trans.div: Order Xiao Xiangu to stabilize the situation

text.transcription: 民國七十五年歲次乙丑季冬之月吉旦

normalization.div: 民國75年歲次乙丑季冬之月吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok Tshit tsa̍p Ngóo nî-huè/nî-hè 次 乙 丑 kuì tang tsi gua̍t Kiat tuànn
man4 gwok3 cat1 sap6 ng5 nin4 seoi3 ci3 jyut3/jyut6 cau2 gwai3 dung1 zi1 jyut6 gat1 daan3
mínguó qī shí wǔ nián suì cì yǐ chǒu jì dōng zhī yuè jí dàn

trans.div: In the 75th year of the Republic of China, the year of Yichou is the auspicious day of the winter month.

text.transcription: 顕祖考吳公諱清續佳城

normalization.div: 顕祖考吳公諱清續佳城

transliterations.transliteration: hián tsóo khó ngôo king 諱 tshing sio̍k kha siânn
hin2 zou2 haau2 ng4 gung1 wai5 ceng1/cing1 zuk6 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn zǔ kǎo wú gōng huì qīng xù jiā chéng

names.name: 將延陵雕刻當吳氏的堂號
湖東泰山石敢當李元帥中營
Hudong Taishan Shigandang Central General Li
湖東南無阿彌陀佛東營
Hudong Namo Amituofo East General
